detection_signals: Every bottle of Madeira tastes sweet
why_incorrect: Madeira exists in a range of styles from dry to sweet. Categories include: Dry/Seco, Medium Dry/Meio Seco, Medium Sweet/Meio Doce, and Sweet/Doce. Sweetness is a production declaration choice.
misconception: All Madeira wines are sweet, regardless of producer or vintage.
corrected_understanding: Madeira is produced in multiple sweetness levels: Dry, Medium Dry, Medium Sweet, and Sweet. Not all Madeiras are sweet.
